basics.name: Santiago Ariel Mansfeld
basics.label: DevOps Engineer & Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: DevOps & Infrastructure Engineer with experience in automation, CI/CD, cloud, and scalable infrastructure. Focused on optimization, reliability, and continuous improvement of platforms and processes.

work.name: CVC Corp Argentina
work.summary: As a Senior DevOps Engineer, I lead the design and evolution of scalable, high-availability Cloud architectures. I am responsible for defining automation standards using Infrastructure as Code (IaC), optimizing continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines for multiple development teams, and improving observability strategies for the company's critical systems.
highlights: Technical leadership in Cloud infrastructure design
Advanced implementation of Infrastructure as Code
Evolution of SRE practices, observability, and DevOps culture

work.name: Accusys Technology
work.summary: As a Mid-level (SSR) DevOps Engineer, I managed Continuous Integration (CI) and Continuous Delivery (CD) processes, optimizing infrastructure and automating deployments. Developed internal tools for artifact management using React and NodeJS. Key technologies: Jenkins, Ansible, SonarQube, React, NodeJS.

work.name: RDigital
work.summary: End-to-end development of B2B and B2C e-commerce platforms from conception to deployment. Built scalable architectures with NodeJS, React, NestJS, and PostgreSQL. Infrastructure managed with Docker-Compose, PM2, and CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Deployments on AWS and Hostinger.

work.name: Lomas de Zamora Municipality
work.summary: Comprehensive administration of municipal IT infrastructure. Management of Windows/Linux servers, implementation of corporate VPNs, administration of VMware virtualization, and perimeter security systems.

work.name: National University of La Matanza - GIDSA
work.summary: Development of telemetry and control systems for aerospace applications. Integration with Satnogs and NASA OPENMCT APIs for satellite monitoring and implementation of space communication protocols.

projects.name: Automated CI/CD System
projects.description: Complete CI/CD pipeline implementation with Jenkins, Ansible, and SonarQube for private infrastructure.

projects.name: EasySync
projects.description: Release management. Full-stack web application for pipeline control, notifications, and distribution.

projects.name: Dealshop
projects.description: Full B2C / B2B e-commerce developed end-to-end and deployed in production.

projects.name: MarketFull
projects.description: E-commerce marketplace featuring microservices architecture, inventory system, and payment gateway.
